cards.back: A matrix with all elements being either 0 or 1, used to represent relations, directed graphs, and partial orders
A graphical representation of a partial order, showing the order relations between elements
A relation that is reflexive, symmetric, and transitive, used to define partitions of a set
A graph where edges have direction, used to represent relations, directed acyclic graphs, and flow networks
A relation that is reflexive, antisymmetric, and transitive, used to define ordering relationships between elements
